trail.val: P-Series >15% of revenue; X-Series initial ship
Scorpio X-Series in production; guided to be the largest product line by Q4 2026
ALAB 'the way to play the Trainium trade'; scale-up content-per-accelerator underestimated

forward.note: Scorpio scale-up (X-Series) is the growth leg; MS base case has Scorpio >doubling to $186M in 2026 (~70% Scorpio-X).
Sustained ~+90%+ y/y growth into Q2; revision-trade risk flagged on stretched momentum.

trail.val: TD Cowen scale-up components TAM (redrivers/retimers/switches) >$67B by 2030 inside >$155B systems market
UALink switches (higher ASP than PCIe) deploy 2027 alongside Amazon + AMD ASIC/GPU launches - the 'key inflection point'
MS scale-up market 34% CAGR 2024-30 to ~$17B; ALAB guides incremental $5B scale-up TAM by 2030

forward.note: 2027 UALink (higher ASP) is the next inflection; TD Cowen sees NVLink-Fusion attach on Trainium 4 as ~2028/29 re-accel.

trail.val: content per accelerator >$1,000 and rising (optical NPO 2027, CPO 2028, NVLink Fusion/KV-cache layering on)
memory tightness + higher memory/storage intensity on inferencing creating fresh CXL/PCIe-switch opportunities

forward.note: Content compounding as optical and custom layer on; memory-tiering a new pull-forward driver for Leo/CXL.

trail.val: 75.7% NG GM, -70bps q/q on hardware mix
Q1 76.4% (+70bps); Q2 guide ~73% incl. ~200bps drag from Amazon warrant/customer agreement

forward.note: Amazon warrant non-cash charge hits GM from Q2 2026; richer hardware-module/Scorpio mix also dilutive.

trail.val: $6.5B cumulative Amazon warrant-linked purchase agreement; two new US-hyperscaler Scorpio design wins
Scorpio P to two additional major hyperscalers late-2026; 2nd Leo CXL win + KV-cache controller win (ships 2027)

forward.note: Design-win cadence underpins the forward ramp; binary on hyperscaler timing given top-5 ~90% concentration.
